title: UFO Sighting in New York: Strange Lights Spotted Hovering Over Queens Skyline in US, Video Surfaces
description: New York residents were shocked after a viral video of mystery orbs flying over NYC in the US. The silent, glowing spheres appeared to chase each other across the sky on Thursday night. While the FAA reviews radar data, witnesses say the objects’ maneuvers defy conventional drone technology, sparking a fresh UFO debate in NYC.
